zh.Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓
zh.Winterbourne, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏文特爾布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de la Lynde於1250年出生在英國波克夏文特爾布恩時，他的父親Sir John de la Lynde30歲，母親Joan de Neville11247歲。他於1266年與Alice de La Lynde在英國戴文哈特雷結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年在英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de la Lynde于1250年出生在英国波克夏文特爾布恩时，他的父亲Sir John de la Lynde30岁，母亲Joan de Neville11247岁。他于1266年与Alice de La Lynde在英国戴文哈特雷结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年在英国巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lynde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: de

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern informal pet form of Larry (compare Baz from Barry and Gaz from Gary).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de la Lynde was born in 1250, in Winterbourne, Berkshire, England, his father, Sir John de la Lynde, was 30 and his mother, Joan de Neville, was 11247. He married Alice de La Lynde in 1266, in Hartley, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1320, in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de la Lynde est né en 1250, à Winterbourne, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de la Lynde, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de Neville, avait 11247 ans. Il a épousé Alice de La Lynde en 1266, à Hartley, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1320, à Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de la Lynde 1250 in Winterbourne, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de la Lynde 30 und seine Mutter Joan de Neville 11247. Er hat 1266 in Hartley, Devon, England Alice de La Lynde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de la Lynde è nato il nel 1250 nel Winterbourne, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de la Lynde, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Neville, aveva 11247 anni. Lui sposato Alice de La Lynde nel 1266, nel Hartley, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1320, nel Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de la Lyndeが1250年にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンテルボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir John de la Lyndeは30歳，母Joan de Nevilleは11247歳であった。1266年にイギリスデボンハートリーでAlice de La Lyndeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオルバートンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de la Lynde(이)가 1250년 영국 버크실르 윈터보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de la Lynde(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Neville(은)는 11247세였다. 그는 1266년 영국 데폰 하틀리에서 Alice de La Lynde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 벅잉함실르 울버턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de la Lynde nasceu em 1250, em Winterbourne, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de la Lynde, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Neville, tinha 11247 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de La Lynde em 1266, em Hartley, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de la Lynde родился в 1250 г. в местности винтирбурн, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de la Lynde было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Neville, 11247. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de La Lynde в 1266 г. в местности хартли, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности волвиртон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de la Lynde nació en 1250, en Winterbourne, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de la Lynde, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan de Neville, tenía 11247 años. Se casó con Alice de La Lynde en 1266, en Hartley, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1320, en Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
